name: GitHub Issues
description: Browse open GitHub issues across your repos (via the gh CLI) or one repo in a searchable, sortable dialog, with an "Assigned to me" filter; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to open and review it. An issue can also be started in Autopilot (the operator-triggered issue → merge-ready-PR pipeline), which posts its progress back as issue comments. The prompt template is editable in settings.
author: Cockpit
